candidate_definition_hints.text: ComfyUI Wrapper for Hunyuan3D v2.1 - From Images to High-Fidelity 3D Assets with Production-Ready PBR Material
> **ComfyUI integration** for Tencent's powerful **Hunyuan3D-2.1** model. Supports textured 3D generation with optional high-quality UV mapping.
